name: Trane Technologies plc
description: Trane Technologies plc is a global climate innovator that creates comfortable, energy-efficient, and sustainable indoor environments for commercial and residential applications. Through its premier brands, Trane and Thermo King, the company provides advanced heating, ventilation, and air conditioning systems, as well as transport refrigeration solutions. Headquartered in Ireland, Trane Technologies is committed to sustainability, aiming to reduce one gigaton of carbon emissions from its customers' footprints by 2030. The company focuses on decarbonization, electrification, and circularity to deliver long-term value for its customers, investors, and the planet.
